allow:
Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Kill running dev server before build to prevent .next corruption

Building while a dev server is running overwrites .next mid-use,
leaving it in an inconsistent state that causes 500 errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Replace killProcessOnPort with pure Node.js /proc parsing

The previous implementation used fuser/lsof which aren''t available in
this environment, causing silent failure and EADDRINUSE on startup.
Now parses /proc/net/tcp\(6\) for listening socket inodes and scans
/proc/[pid]/fd/ to find the owning PID — zero external dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update baseline-browser-mapping to silence outdated data warning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
